name: Product Release
purpose: The purpose is to control the release of a product to the intended customer.

outcomes.text: The contents of the product releases are determined.
The release package is assembled from configured items.
The release documentation is defined and produced.
Release approval is performed against defined criteria.
The release package is made available to the intended customer.

basePractices.title: Define the functional content of releases
basePractices.description: Define the functionality to be included and the release criteria for each release. parameter files (influencing the identified system functionality) that are needed for the release.

basePractices.title: Define release package
basePractices.description: Define the release as well as supporting tools and information.

basePractices.title: Ensure unique identification of releases
basePractices.description: Ensure a unique identification of the release based upon the intended purpose and expectations of the release. releases.

basePractices.title: Build the release from items under configuration control
basePractices.description: Build the release from items under configuration control to ensure integrity.

basePractices.title: Ensure release approval before delivery
basePractices.description: Criteria for the release are satisfied before delivery takes place.

basePractices.title: Provide a release note
basePractices.description: A release is accompanied by information detailing key characteristics of the release. legislation that is considered etc. See also VAL.1 Validation. SPL2.BP7: Communicate the type, service level and duration of support for a release. Identify and communicate the type, service level and duration of support for a release.

basePractices.title: Deliver the release package to the intended customer
basePractices.description: Deliver the release package to the intended customer. SPL.2 Product Release 1 emoctuO 2 emoctuO 3 emoctuO 4 emoctuO 5 emoctuO
